title: Apothic Combat: Singled Out
description: Apothic Combat containing only the Entity Reach attribute changes.
body:
Like the original mod, Apotheosis is required. The mod is not available on Modrinth.

**Apothic Combat** does the following to ensure compatibility between Better Combat and Apotheosis:

> - Registers all two-handed Better Combat weapons automatically as HEAVY_WEAPON for Apotheosis
> - Removes the Entity Reach Attribute from all weapons, and makes the attack range affix nonfunctional

However, the first feature may be undesirable as it is not configurable. **Apothic Combat: Singled Out** gets rid of this feature, allowing weapon categories to remain customizable while keeping the Attack Range feature.
